Fello (Electron ACP Client)

Runtime
- Main process: src/electron/main.ts
- Preload (contextBridge): src/electron/preload.ts
- Backend Logic (Node.js): src/backend/ (includes IPC handlers, ACP bridge, terminal manager, WebUI server)
- Renderer (React + Vite): src/mainview/

IPC
- Typed contracts: src/shared/schema.ts
- Renderer API wrapper: src/mainview/backend.ts (uses window.fello or WebSocket fallback for WebUI)
- Electron-only native API: src/mainview/electron.ts (safely wraps window.fello calls)

Sessions & Persistence
- Session metadata persistence: src/backend/storage.ts
- Message history is replayed from the ACP server when resuming a session
- Renderer state store: src/mainview/store.ts
- ChatMessage polymorphic interface: src/mainview/chat-message.ts (supports ContentBlocks for text, image, audio, etc.)
- Content block rendering: src/mainview/components/content-blocks/
- Common Components: src/mainview/components/common/ (CodeView, CodeCompareView powered by react-diff-viewer-continued & shiki, ImageView, ReadonlyTerminal)
- ACP events handling: src/mainview/lib/session-state-reducer.ts

Dev / Build Commands
- npm run dev (electron-vite dev; Vite server on http://localhost:5173)
- npm run build
- npm run preview
- npm run lint
- npm run typecheck
- npm run format

Repo Conventions
- Electron code lives under src/electron
- Backend logic lives under src/backend
- UI code lives under src/mainview
